zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Covert於1505年出生在英國素可素林頓時，她的父親John Covert Esq.33歲，母親Isabel Pelham43歲。她於1521年之前與Sir William Goring結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年11月16日在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨享年53歲，埋葬在英國素可登可頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Covert于1505年出生在英国素可素林頓时，她的父亲John Covert Esq.33岁，母亲Isabel Pelham43岁。她于1521年之前与Sir William Goring结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年11月16日在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨享年53岁，埋葬在英国素可登可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Covert was born in 1505, in Sullington, Sussex, England, her father, John Covert Esq., was 33 and her mother, Isabel Pelham, was 43. She married Sir William Goring before 1521. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 November 1558, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Duncton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Covert est née en 1505, à Sullington, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Covert Esq., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel Pelham, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Goring avant 1521. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 novembre 1558, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Duncton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Covert 1505 in Sullington, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Covert Esq. 33 und ihre Mutter Isabel Pelham 43. Sie hat vor 1521 Sir William Goring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. November 1558 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England und wurde in Duncton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Covert è nata il nel 1505 nel Sullington, Sussex, England, sua padre, John Covert Esq., aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabel Pelham, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Goring prima del 1521. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1558, nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Duncton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Covertが1505年にイギリススセックススリントンで生まれた時，父John Covert Esq.は33歳，母Isabel Pelhamは43歳であった。1521年以前にSir William Goringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年11月16日にイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツで53歳で死去し，イギリススセックスダンクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Covert(이)가 1505년 영국 수세스 설링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Covert Esq.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Pelham(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1521년 이전 Sir William Goring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 11월 16일 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 던크턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Covert nasceu em 1505, em Sullington, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Covert Esq., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Pelham, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Goring antes 1521. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1558, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Duncton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Covert родилась в 1505 г. в местности суллингтон, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Covert Esq. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Pelham, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Goring перед 1521 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 ноября 1558 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности дунктон, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Covert nació en 1505, en Sullington, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Covert Esq., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel Pelham, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir William Goring antes de 1521. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1558, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Duncton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
